title: Basic JavaScript React Hooks
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript React Hooks. Focus on implementing useState patterns correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript React Hooks
description: Create a function that uses useState patterns and useEffect lifecycle together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript React Hooks Project
description: Build a small application that applies useState patterns, useEffect lifecycle, useContext for global state in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript React Hooks
description: The following code has bugs related to useState patterns. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript React Hooks
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with useState patterns and useEffect lifecycle.
